name: Legends Of Runeterra Conversion: Dreamlit Paths

cards.rules_text:
[i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)[/i]
I, II — Discard a card. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value 7 or greater, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
III — The first spell you cast this turn costs {5} less to cast.

cards.rules_text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

[i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)[/i]
I — Create two Sand Soldier tokens.
II — Predict [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]
III — Until the end of turn, creatures you control enter with +2/+0 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

cards.rules_text:
Empire Reconstructor can block creatures with shadow as if it had shadow. [i](This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)[/i]
When Empire Reconstructor enters, target enchantment landmark you control gets “If this enchantment would enter the graveyard, exile it, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control instead”.
Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three legendary creature cards, choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

cards.rules_text:
[i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)[/i]

Return a creature with the highest power among creatures in your graveyard to the battlefield, it gets ephemeral.

cards.rules_text:
Brash [i](Creatures with Brash cannot be blocked by creatures with 2 or less toughness.)[/i]
When Soaring Cartographer enters, reveal a card from your hand, then choose one —
• Shuffle it into your library, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a spell with mana value greater than the revealed card, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
• Shuffle it into your library, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a spell with mana value less than the revealed card, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
Choose a nonlegendary creature you control. Create two tokens that are copies of it.

cards.rules_text: Spritelings enters with two +1/+1 counters.

First strike
Lillia enters with a +1/+1 counter.
Whenever Lillia enters or deals damage, you may pay {2}, if you do, target creature you control phases out. [i](Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)[/i]
Whenever a creature or landmark you control enters, put a Dream counter on Lillia. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Lillia has fifteen or more Dream counters, remove all Dream counters from Lillia, then transform her.
Partner [i](You can have two commanders if both have partner.)[/i]

cards.rules_text:

Choose a creature you control. Move all counters from that creature onto target creature you control. Then recall the chosen creature. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]

[i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Ultrasoft Poro enters, you gain X life where X is equal to the number of unique creature types among creatures you control.

Put a number of +0/+1 counters on target creature you control equal to its power, and a formidable counter. That creature has base power 0. [i](This creature assigns damage equal to its toughness rather than its power. Damage is dealt to this creature in the form of -1/-1 counters.)[/i]
When Brynhir Thundersong enters, exile a creature card from your hand with a number of time counters on it equal to its mana value. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend.
Whenever Luminosprite attacks, target other attacking creature you control gets +X/+Y where X is equal to Luminosprites power and Y is equal to Luminosprites toughness.
Boost all creatures. [i](Give all creatures another ability and counter of each kind already there.)[/i]

Jarro Lightfeather enters with a +1/+1 counter.
When Jarro Lightfeather enters, until the end of turn, the next creature you cast enters with an additional +1/+1 counter.

Lux enters with a +1/+1 counter.
Whenever Lux attacks, put a shield counter on Lux. Then put a +1/+1 counter on target other attacking creature you control. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]
At the beginning of your post-combat main phase, if one or more creatures you control with a total of twenty or more counters among them attacked this turn, transform Lux.
Partner [i](You can have two commanders if both have partner.)[/i]
cards.rules_text2:
First strike
Whenever Lux attacks, put a shield counter on Lux. Then put a +1/+1 counter on target other attacking creature you control. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]
If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.
